reviews.comment:
Buen parador con buen lugar para tomar y comer algo, aparte de cargar combustible. Tiene lugar al aire libre también para comer algo o tomar un mate. En temporada se llena.

(Translated by Google)
A good inn with a good place to have a drink and a meal, as well as fill up with gas. It also has an outdoor space for a bite to eat or a mate. It gets packed during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnN1ltYTFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No hay mucho para decir de una estación de servicio. Está ubicada hacia el lado Mar del Plata - Buenos Aires. Tiene estacionamiento entre los surtidores y la cafetería y también en la parte posterior. Acceso para discapacitados y algunos juegos de plaza para niños. Es un lugar muy bonito, bien cuidado

(Translated by Google)
There's not much to say about this gas station. It's located on the Mar del Plata-Buenos Aires side of the road. It has parking between the pumps and the café, and also in the back. There's disabled access and a small playground for children. It's a very nice, well-maintained place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRczRpYTZBRRAB
